channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Economic Indicators Affecting Stocks and Commodities in 2026
item.description: Dis year 2026, anyone investing in stocks or commodities must pay attention to different economic signals dat affect markets. Inflation is a big one; high inflation can make stock prices drop and caus...

item.title: Nvidia Shows Strong Revenue Growth and Attractive Valuation Despite High Market Cap
item.description: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) continues to attract investor attention due to its remarkable growth metrics and valuation. Trading at approximately 26 times forward earnings with a 65.47% revenue increase in t...

item.title: Judge Rules Evidence from Backpack Cannot Be Used in Health Insurance CEO Murder Trial
item.description: A New York state court judge has ruled that evidence found in Luigi Mangione’s backpack during his arrest cannot be used in his upcoming murder trial. Mangione, 28, faces charges for the December 2024...

item.title: Senate Begins Impeachment Proceedings Against VP Sara Duterte
item.description: On May 18, 2026, the Philippine Senate formally convened as an impeachment court to hear the case against Vice President Sara Duterte, following her second impeachment by the House of Representatives....

item.title: African Fintech Shows Signs of Recovery and Investment Potential
item.description: African fintech is experiencing a resurgence in investor interest, driven by the continent's unique financial challenges and growing market opportunities. In late 2025, South Africa's Optasia and Moro...

item.title: Carrie Bickmore takes time off radio to treat vocal cord damage after facial injury
item.description: Carrie Bickmore, the well-known Australian radio presenter, has announced she will be off-air for an indefinite period due to ongoing issues with her vocal cords. This follows a recent accident in whi...

item.title: DOJ Recommends Filing of Plunder and Graft Cases Against Estrada, Bonoan in Flood Control Probe
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) has recommended the filing of plunder and graft charges against Senator Jinggoy Estrada and former DPWH Secretary Manuel Bonoan in connection with alleged corruption in...

item.title: Ben Murray-Bruce Denies Disqualification from APC Senatorial Primary List
item.description: Former Bayelsa East senator, Ben Murray-Bruce, has come out to deny reports claiming say him don withdraw or get disqualified from the All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial race ahead of the 2027...

item.title: Steps and Timeline After Completing Voter Registration for 2026 BSKE
item.description: On the last day of voter registration for the 2026 Barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan Elections (BSKE), long queues were reported at multiple registration sites. According to Comelec, registration oper...

item.title: Trump Shares AI-Generated Image With Alien, Sparking Public Speculation

item.title: Zohran Mamdani's Actions and Achievements in His First Four Months

item.title: The 1902 Baker Electric Runabout: A Pioneering Electric Vehicle
item.description: The 1902 Baker Electric Runabout is an early example of electric vehicle innovation, manufactured by the Baker Motor Vehicle Company in Cleveland, Ohio. Unlike the noisy and cumbersome gasoline cars o...

item.title: McArthur Wheeler's Infamous Bank Robbery and the Birth of the Dunning–Kruger Effect
item.description: In 1995, McArthur Wheeler, a 44-year-old man from Pittsburgh, carried out a bizarre bank robbery that would later become famous for its psychological implications. Believing that lemon juice could ren...

item.title: Audit recommends Inuit-led reforms for Nunavik Police Service to improve representation and community safety

item.title: Court extends Anmol alias Pinky's physical remand in murder case amid torture allegations
item.description: In Karachi, alleged drug queenpin Anmol, also known as Pinky, has been remanded into police custody for four more days in connection with a murder case. She faces at least 15 ongoing criminal cases, i...

item.title: Experts Explain Why Seasonal Allergies Are Intensifying Across Canada
item.description: Seasonal allergies are becoming more severe in Canada, according to health experts. Increased pollen levels, changing weather patterns, and longer warm seasons are contributing to more intense allergi...

item.title: Rotterdam authorities quarantine crew and disinfect cruise ship after hantavirus outbreak
item.description: The MV Hondius, a luxury polar expedition cruise ship, has docked in Rotterdam after a hantavirus outbreak affected passengers and crew. Dutch authorities are quarantining the remaining 27 people on b...

item.title: Amazon Launches AI-Powered Podcasts Through Alexa+ With Customizable Topics
item.description: Amazon has introduced a new feature for its Alexa+ AI voice assistant that generates podcasts entirely using artificial intelligence. The company announced that Alexa+ can now produce full audio episo...

item.title: Bernadette Peters’ Early Breakthrough in Dames at Sea
item.description: Bernadette Peters first gained widespread attention for her performance as Ruby in the 1966 Off-Off-Broadway production of “Dames at Sea” at Caffe Cino. She reprised the role in the 1968 Off-Broadway ...

item.title: Kenyan Women Admire Aga Khan Cardiologist After TV Interview
item.description: A section of Kenyan women have expressed admiration for Dr Mohamed Jeilani, a cardiologist at Aga Khan University Hospital, following his recent appearance on live TV. During the broadcast, Dr Jeilani...
